visuals.title: Importance of Head Pointer
visuals.description: Why we must maintain the head pointer

steps.label: Head points to first node
steps.note: Head is our only entry point

steps.label: Lose head = lose entire list
steps.note: Without head, nodes become unreachable (memory leak)
